IT Support • Xestro Support • Paper-to-Digital
Purple Vector Operations
Get in touch

About

Local support for clinics that want their systems to stop fighting back.

Purple Vector Operations provides practical, non-clinical support for medical practices and individual clinicians across Tasmania. Services include practice administration support, Xestro assistance, workflow optimisation, paper-to-digital medical records conversion, and secure data handling. PVO works alongside existing staff and IT providers to reduce admin load, clean up legacy systems, and keep clinic operations running smoothly.

What we’re good at
  • Clinic-first IT support (remote + on-site when needed)
  • Xestro templates, workflows, recalls, billing, reporting
  • Secure scanning, conversion, and document organisation
  • Automation to remove repetitive admin tasks
How we work
  • Clear scope, plain-English updates, no mystery invoices
  • Security-minded by default (least privilege, backups, audit trails)
  • Documentation so you are not locked-in to tribal knowledge
  • Retainers available for predictable support and ongoing improvements

Services

Practical IT + clinic workflow support, minus the drama.

Managed IT Support

Retainer-based remote support, maintenance, monitoring, and quick help when things break (they will).

Popular
  • Remote support retainer (Lite) from $50/wk
  • Patch + maintenance windows from $60/m
  • User + device onboarding from $120

Xestro Support

Templates, recalls, billing workflows, reporting, user access, and training to make Xestro behave.

Popular
  • Template & label pack from $50/m
  • Recall clean-up & rebuild from $180
  • Billing workflow tune-up from $220

Paper-to-Digital

Secure scanning and conversion to searchable PDFs, with sensible naming and folder structures.

Popular
  • Scan + OCR to searchable PDF from $0.25/page
  • Folder + naming structure setup from $120
  • Bulk file clean-up from $180

Automation Services

Cut the repetitive stuff. Automations for reminders, reporting, document flows, and “why do we do this?” tasks.

Popular
  • Automation maintenance pack (monthly) $120–$180/m
  • Operational analytics reporting (monthly) $320–$1200/m
  • AI drafting pack (monthly) $110/m

Hardware Maintenance

The unglamorous but essential stuff: server cupboards, printers, UPS checks, cabling, and keeping equipment sane.

Popular
  • Server cupboard / equipment check $90/m
  • Active backup monitoring $10/wk
  • Device & asset register upkeep $15/wk

Admin Support

Clinic admin help without the “have you tried turning it off and on?” energy. Training, setup, and tidy processes.

Popular
  • Admin workflow optimisation $180
  • Staff onboarding & training $150
  • Patient comms pack (SMS/Email) $60/m
  • Appointment booking optimisation $120
  • Document + form library setup $60/m

Hover over a service title to see popular inclusions and price ranges.

Contact

Quick reply, no ticket labyrinth.
